titleStmt.title: SII 36.3: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 3. (A.R. No. 3 of 1910.) MUḌIGOṆḌAM (Muḍigoṇḍa), KOLLEGAL TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT. On the south wall of the Lakshmī Nārāyaṇaśvāmi temple.

summary.p: (Rudrōdkāri, Chittirai, 5, Wednesday, Uttirāḍam = A.D. 1323, March 30, Wednesday).

The guild of merchants of Aiññūṟṟuvar of one thousand directions, merchants of the 18 towns situated north of the Kāvēri river including Taḻaikkāḍu alias Rājarājapura and those of the 18 towns south of the same river including Muḍikoṇḍachōḻapuram alias Dēśiyuyyakkoṇḍa-paṭṭaṇa met in a grand assembly and agreed to grant income accrued on various tolls levied on merchandize traded in the locality as paṭṭaṇappakuti to the temple of Nārāyaṇa Perumāḷ also called Dēsip-perumāḷ for its maintenance and repairs. The tolls were collected in grains from thrashing fields, and money (paṇam) on commodities marketed. The various articles on which tolls imposed were pepper, areca nut, jaggery, salt, cotton, cotton cloth, silk thread, and sandal (candaṇam). The several rates of tolls on these commodities are specified.
Published in E.C. (n), Vol. IV, No. Kol. 97.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pocaḷa vīraval ṉ pradhivirācciyam paṇṇiyaruḷāniṟka rutroṟkāri samvatsarattuc cittirai mātam Añcāntiyati putaṉkiḻamaiyum Uttirāṭamum Aṣṭamiyum peṟṟa nāḷ svastiśrī muṭikoṇṭacoḻapuramāṉa teciyuyyak koṇṭa paṭṭa
ṇattut tirumeṟkoyilnāyaṉār yaṇap perumāḷukku maṇa rukkum nāccimārukkun tiruppaṇikkun tirunāḷukkum paṭṭaṇappakuti niccayittapaṭiyāvatu svastiśrī nāṉkuticaip patiṉeṇpūmi ticaiyāyirattaiññūṟṟuvarum taḻaikkāṭāṉa rājarājapura mutalāṉa vaṭakarai patiṉeṭṭup paṭṭaṇamum
muṭikoṇṭacoḻapuramāṉa teciyuyyakkoṇṭa paṭṭaṇamutalāṉa teṉkarai patiṉeṭṭup paṭṭaṇamu muṟcāttum niṟaivaṟa niṟaintu kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyemmilicaintu Aññūṟṟuvaṉiliruntu tecipperumāḷukkup paṭṭaṇappakuti niccayittapaṭi Ivvūr nāṟpālellaiyuḷ polikaḷaṅkaḷtoṟu maḷakkumavaiyiṟṟukku nūṟṟukku Oru kuḷakamum
niṟukku mavaiyiṟṟukkuk koḷvāṉoru palamum koṭuppā ṉoru palamum Eṇṇumavaiyiṟṟukku Āyirattukkup pattup pākkum naṭaimākkalaṅkaḷukku miḷaku potiyoṉṟukkup paṇam kālum pākkup potiyoṉṟukkup paṇam Araikkālum puṭavaic cumaṭoṉṟiṉāṟpaṭi yaṟupattu nālukkup paṇam Oṉṟaraiyum puṭavaikkaṭṭoṉṟiṉāṟpaṭi nūṟu
kaṭṭukkup paṇa mūṉṟē mukkālum palamaṇṭalaccarakkup paṭṭunūl cumaṭoṉṟukkup paṇa mūṉṟumayiracantaṉam cumaṭoṉṟukkup paṇamiraṇṭum paruttinūl poti yoṉṟukkup paṇam kālum paruttip potiyoṉṟukkup paṇa mākāṇiyum
potiyoṉṟukkup paṇam Oru māvum vellap potiyoṉṟukkup paṇa mākāṇiyum Uppup potiyoṉṟukkup paṇam Oru māvum cevoṉṟukkup paṇa maraikkāṇiyum Ippaṭikku Icaintu kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik kuṭuttom
taḻaikkāṭu muṭikoṇṭa muṭpaṭṭa patiṉeṭṭuppaṭṭaṇamum nāṉkuticaip patiṉeṇpūmi patiṉeṇviṣaiyattārum Ippaṭikku Ahitañ ceytāruṇṭākil Iṉatturōki gurutturōki Irācatturōki samaiyat
turōkiyākak kaṭavarkaḷ gaṅkaik karaiyil kurāṟpacuvai vathittāṉumākak kaṭavarkaḷ
Digital edition of SII 36.3 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
